intentSynonyms: show me my files in slack
see all my files in slack
list files in a channel or workspace in slack
description: List files in a Slack channel or workspace with optional filters

channel.description: Channel ID to filter files by — omit to search the entire workspace

count.description: Number of files to return (default 20, max 100)

types.description: Filter by file type: all, spaces, snippets, images, gdocs, zips, pdfs (default all)

user.description: Filter files by the user who uploaded them (user ID)
